items.title: Multi-class classification loss
items.description: Softmax cross-entropy on one-hot labels minimizes D_KL(P || Q_θ) where P puts mass 1 on the true class; the fixed H(P) term does not affect gradients.

items.title: Variational autoencoders
items.description: The ELBO includes KL(q(z|x) || p(z)) regularizing the encoder toward the prior; optimizing the bound minimizes reconstruction error plus this KL penalty.

items.title: RLHF and policy regularization
items.description: Fine-tuning with a KL penalty D_KL(π_θ || π_ref) prevents the policy from drifting far from a trusted reference while optimizing reward.

items.title: Knowledge distillation
items.description: Students match teacher softmax outputs via KL on temperature-scaled logits, transferring rich probability structure beyond hard labels.
